name: Premier Sports Simulators
about: Premier Sports Simulators offers virtual golf and multisport gaming using Full Swing™ Simulators. Located at 14901 23 Mile Rd in Shelby Charter Township, the facility features three Full Swing™ simulators, the same technology used by touring professionals like Tiger Woods and Jordan Spieth. The venue provides a range of services including course play, multisport gaming, swing analysis, and certified club fitting. Pricing is based on hourly rates, with special rates available for leagues and group events.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional-grade Full Swing™ simulators used by tour players
Comprehensive swing analysis with HD video and launch monitor data
84 premier virtual golf courses from around the world
Certified PGA club fitting services for equipment optimization
Option for leagues, group outings, and private events

food_and_drink.notes: Multiple catering choices available for group outings and parties
BYOB policy allows bringing your own alcohol

simulator_hardware.notes: Professional-grade simulators used by tour professionals

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf equipment. The facility also offers certified club fitting services if you need equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue allows bringing your own food and drinks. They also offer catering options for group events and parties.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18 holes typically take 2-3 hours depending on the pace of play and number of players in your group.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and suitable for kids. They offer multisport gaming options that can be enjoyed by all ages.
